arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: يس
english translation text:
Ya Seen!
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَالْقُرْآنِ الْحَكِيمِ
english translation text:
By the Wise Quran,
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
english translation text:
you are indeed one of the apostles,
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: عَلَىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
english translation text:
on a straight path.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: تَنزِيلَ الْعَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
[It is a scripture] sent down gradually from the All-mighty, the All-merciful
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّا أُنذِرَ آبَاؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَافِلُونَ
english translation text:
that you may warn a people whose fathers were not warned, so they are oblivious.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: لَقَدْ حَقَّ الْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
english translation text:
The word has certainly become due against most of them, so they will not have faith.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِي أَعْنَاقِهِمْ أَغْلَالًا فَهِيَ إِلَى الْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed We have put iron collars around their necks, which are up to the chins, so their heads are upturned.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَجَعَلْنَا مِن بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَاهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
english translation text:
And We have put a barrier before them and a barrier behind them, then We have blind-folded them, so they do not see.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَسَوَاءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ أَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
english translation text:
It is the same to them whether you warn them or do not warn them, they will not have faith.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ اتَّبَعَ الذِّكْرَ وَخَشِيَ الرَّحْمَٰنَ بِالْغَيْبِ ۖ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَأَجْرٍ كَرِيمٍ
english translation text:
You can only warn someone who follows the Reminder and fears the All-beneficent in secret; so give him the good news of forgiveness and a noble reward.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْيِي الْمَوْتَىٰ وَنَكْتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوا وَآثَارَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلَّ شَيْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَاهُ فِي إِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
Indeed it is We who revive the dead and write what they have sent ahead and their effects [which they left behind], and We have figured everything in a manifest Imam.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَاضْرِبْ لَهُم مَّثَلًا أَصْحَابَ الْقَرْيَةِ إِذْ جَاءَهَا الْمُرْسَلُونَ
english translation text:
Cite for them the example of the inhabitants of the town when the apostles came to it.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَيْهِمُ اثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوا إِنَّا إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ
english translation text:
When We sent to them two [apostles], they impugned both of them. Then We reinforced them with a third, and they said, ‘We have indeed been sent to you.’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: قَالُوا مَا أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَمَا أَنزَلَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ مِن شَيْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا تَكْذِبُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘You are no other than human beings like us, and the All-beneficent has not sent down anything, and you are only lying.’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: قَالُوا رَبُّنَا يَعْلَمُ إِنَّا إِلَيْكُمْ لَمُرْسَلُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Our Lord knows that we have indeed been sent to you,
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَمَا عَلَيْنَا إِلَّا الْبَلَاغُ الْمُبِينُ
english translation text:
and our duty is only to communicate in clear terms.’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: قَالُوا إِنَّا تَطَيَّرْنَا بِكُمْ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهُوا لَنَرْجُمَنَّكُمْ وَلَيَمَسَّنَّكُم مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Indeed we take you for a bad omen. If you do not desist we will stone you, and surely a painful punishment will visit you from us.’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: قَالُوا طَائِرُكُم مَّعَكُمْ ۚ أَئِن ذُكِّرْتُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّسْرِفُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Your bad omens attend you. What! If you are admonished.... Indeed, you are an unrestrained lot.’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَجَاءَ مِنْ أَقْصَى الْمَدِينَةِ رَجُلٌ يَسْعَىٰ قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ اتَّبِعُوا الْمُرْسَلِينَ
english translation text:
There came a man hurrying from the city outskirts. He said, ‘O my people! Follow the apostles!
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: اتَّبِعُوا مَن لَّا يَسْأَلُكُمْ أَجْرًا وَهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
english translation text:
Follow them who do not ask you any reward and they are rightly guided.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَمَا لِيَ لَا أَعْبُدُ الَّذِي فَطَرَنِي وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
english translation text:
Why should I not worship Him who has originated me, and to whom you shall be brought back?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: أَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِ آلِهَةً إِن يُرِدْنِ الرَّحْمَٰنُ بِضُرٍّ لَّا تُغْنِ عَنِّي شَفَاعَتُهُمْ شَيْئًا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ
english translation text:
Shall I take gods besides Him? If the All-beneficent desired to cause me any distress, their intercession will not avail me in any way, nor will they rescue me.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِنِّي إِذًا لَّفِي ضَلَالٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
Indeed, then I would be in manifest error.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِنِّي آمَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَاسْمَعُونِ
english translation text:
Indeed I have faith in your Lord, so listen to me.’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: قِيلَ ادْخُلِ الْجَنَّةَ ۖ قَالَ يَا لَيْتَ قَوْمِي يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
He was told, ‘Enter paradise!’ He said, ‘Alas! Had my people only known
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِي رَبِّي وَجَعَلَنِي مِنَ الْمُكْرَمِينَ
english translation text:
for what my Lord forgave me and made me one of the honoured ones!’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَمَا أَنزَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ مِن بَعْدِهِ مِن جُندٍ مِّنَ السَّمَاءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
english translation text:
After him We did not send down on his people a host from the sky, nor We would have sent down.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خَامِدُونَ
english translation text:
It was but a single Cry, and, behold, they were stilled [like burnt ashes]!
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: يَا حَسْرَةً عَلَى الْعِبَادِ ۚ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا بِهِ يَسْتَهْزِئُونَ
english translation text:
How regrettable of the servants! There did not come to them any apostle but that they used to deride him.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ الْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
english translation text:
Have they not regarded how many generations We have destroyed before them who will not come back to them?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
english translation text:
And all of them will indeed be presented before Us.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَآيَةٌ لَّهُمُ الْأَرْضُ الْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنَاهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
english translation text:
A sign for them is the dead earth, which We revive and bring forth grain out of it, so they eat of it.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّاتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَابٍ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ الْعُيُونِ
english translation text:
We make in it orchards of date palms and vines, and We cause springs to gush forth in it,
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: لِيَأْكُلُوا مِن ثَمَرِهِ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
english translation text:
so that they may eat of its fruit and what their hands have cultivated. Will they not then give thanks?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي خَلَقَ الْأَزْوَاجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنبِتُ الْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
Immaculate is He who has created all the kinds of what the earth grows, and of themselves, and of what they do not know.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَآيَةٌ لَّهُمُ اللَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ النَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
english translation text:
A sign for them is the night, which We strip of daylight, and, behold, they find themselves in the dark!
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَالشَّمْسُ تَجْرِي لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَّهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ
english translation text:
The sun runs on to its place of rest: That is the ordaining of the All-mighty, the All-knowing.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَالْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَاهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَالْعُرْجُونِ الْقَدِيمِ
english translation text:
As for the moon, We have ordained its phases, until it becomes like an old palm leaf.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: لَا الشَّمْسُ يَنبَغِي لَهَا أَن تُدْرِكَ الْقَمَرَ وَلَا اللَّيْلُ سَابِقُ النَّهَارِ ۚ وَكُلٌّ فِي فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
english translation text:
Neither it behooves the sun to overtake the moon, nor may the night outrun the day, and each swims in an orbit.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَآيَةٌ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِي الْفُلْكِ الْمَشْحُونِ
english translation text:
A sign for them is that We carried their progeny in the laden ship,
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ
english translation text:
and We have created for them what is similar to it, which they ride.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَإِن نَّشَأْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ
english translation text:
And if We like We drown them, whereat they have no one to call for help, nor are they rescued
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِلَّا رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَمَتَاعًا إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
english translation text:
except by a mercy from Us and for an enjoyment until some time.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ اتَّقُوا مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَمَا خَلْفَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
english translation text:
And when they are told, ‘Beware of that which is before you and that which is behind you, so that you may receive [His] mercy…’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِم مِّنْ آيَةٍ مِّنْ آيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
english translation text:
There does not come to them any sign from among the signs of their Lord but that they have been disregarding it.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنفِقُوا مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ اللَّهُ قَالَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا أَنُطْعِمُ مَن لَّوْ يَشَاءُ اللَّهُ أَطْعَمَهُ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِي ضَلَالٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
When they are told, ‘Spend out of what Allah has provided you,’ the faithless say to the faithful, ‘Shall we feed [someone] whom Allah would feed, if He wished? You are only in manifest error.’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا الْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ
english translation text:
And they say, ‘When will this promise be fulfilled, should you be truthful?’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَخِصِّمُونَ
english translation text:
They do not await but a single Cry that will seize them as they wrangle.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَوْصِيَةً وَلَا إِلَىٰ أَهْلِهِمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
english translation text:
Then they will not be able to make any will, nor will they return to their folks.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ الْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ
english translation text:
And when the Trumpet is blown, behold, there they will be, scrambling towards their Lord from their graves!
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: قَالُوا يَا وَيْلَنَا مَن بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرْقَدِنَا ۜ ۗ هَٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ وَصَدَقَ الْمُرْسَلُونَ
english translation text:
They will say, ‘Woe to us! Who raised us from our place of sleep?’ ‘This is what the All-beneficent had promised, and the apostles had spoken the truth!’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
english translation text:
It will be but a single Cry, and, behold, they will all be presented before Us!
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: فَالْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْئًا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
english translation text:
‘Today no soul will be wronged in the least, nor will you be requited except for what you used to do.’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِنَّ أَصْحَابَ الْجَنَّةِ الْيَوْمَ فِي شُغُلٍ فَاكِهُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed today the inhabitants of paradise rejoice in their engagements
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: هُمْ وَأَزْوَاجُهُمْ فِي ظِلَالٍ عَلَى الْأَرَائِكِ مُتَّكِئُونَ
english translation text:
—they and their mates, reclining on couches in the shades.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: لَهُمْ فِيهَا فَاكِهَةٌ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ
english translation text:
There they have fruits, and they have whatever they want.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: سَلَامٌ قَوْلًا مِّن رَّبٍّ رَّحِيمٍ
english translation text:
‘Peace!’—a watchword from the all-merciful Lord.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَامْتَازُوا الْيَوْمَ أَيُّهَا الْمُجْرِمُونَ
english translation text:
And ‘Get apart today, you guilty ones!’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: أَلَمْ أَعْهَدْ إِلَيْكُمْ يَا بَنِي آدَمَ أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوا الشَّيْطَانَ ۖ إِنَّهُ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
‘Did I not exhort you, O children of Adam, saying, “Do not worship Satan. He is indeed your manifest enemy.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَأَنِ اعْبُدُونِي ۚ هَٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
english translation text:
Worship Me. That is a straight path”?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمْ جِبِلًّا كَثِيرًا ۖ أَفَلَمْ تَكُونُوا تَعْقِلُونَ
english translation text:
Certainly, he has led astray many of your generations. Have you not exercised your reason?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: هَٰذِهِ جَهَنَّمُ الَّتِي كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
english translation text:
This is the hell you had been promised!
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: اصْلَوْهَا الْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
english translation text:
Enter it today, because of what you used to deny.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: الْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰ أَفْوَاهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَا أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ
english translation text:
Today We shall seal their mouths, and their hands shall speak to Us, and their feet shall bear witness concerning what they used to earn.’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَاسْتَبَقُوا الصِّرَاطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ
english translation text:
Had We wished We would have blotted out their eyes: then, were they to advance towards the path, how would have they seen?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَمَسَخْنَاهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
english translation text:
And had We wished We would have deformed them in their place; then they would neither have been able to move ahead nor to return.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِي الْخَلْقِ ۖ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
english translation text:
And whomever We give a long life, We cause him to regress in creation. Then, will they not exercise their reason?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَمَا عَلَّمْنَاهُ الشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنبَغِي لَهُ ۚ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْآنٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
We did not teach him poetry, nor does it behoove him. This is just a reminder and a manifest Quran,
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّا وَيَحِقَّ الْقَوْلُ عَلَى الْكَافِرِينَ
english translation text:
so that anyone who is alive may be warned, and that the word may come due against the faithless.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَا أَنْعَامًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مَالِكُونَ
english translation text:
Have they not seen that We have created for them—of what Our hands have worked—cattle, so they have become their masters?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَذَلَّلْنَاهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ
english translation text:
And We made them tractable for them; so some of them make their mounts and some of them they eat.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنَافِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
english translation text:
There are other benefits for them therein, and drinks. Will they not then give thanks?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَاتَّخَذُوا مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ آلِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
english translation text:
They have taken gods besides Allah, [hoping] that they might be helped [by the fake deities].
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ
english translation text:
[But] they cannot help them, while they [themselves] are an army mobilized for their defence.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
english translation text:
So do not let their remarks grieve you. We indeed know whatever they hide and whatever they disclose.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ الْإِنسَانُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَاهُ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
Does not man see that We created him from a drop of [seminal] fluid, and, behold, he is an open contender!?
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًا وَنَسِيَ خَلْقَهُ ۖ قَالَ مَن يُحْيِي الْعِظَامَ وَهِيَ رَمِيمٌ
english translation text:
He draws comparisons for Us, and forgets his own creation. He says, ‘Who shall revive the bones when they have decayed?’
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا الَّذِي أَنشَأَهَا أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ
english translation text:
Say, ‘He will revive them who produced them the first time, and He has knowledge of all creation.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: الَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ الشَّجَرِ الْأَخْضَرِ نَارًا فَإِذَا أَنتُم مِّنْهُ تُوقِدُونَ
english translation text:
He, who made for you fire out of the green tree, and, behold, you light fire from it!
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: أَوَلَيْسَ الَّذِي خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ بِقَادِرٍ عَلَىٰ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ الْخَلَّاقُ الْعَلِيمُ
english translation text:
Is not He who created the heavens and the earth able to create the like of them? Yes indeed! He is the All-creator, the All-knowing.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: إِنَّمَا أَمْرُهُ إِذَا أَرَادَ شَيْئًا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُ كُن فَيَكُونُ
english translation text:
All His command, when He wills something, is to say to it ‘Be,’ and it is.
Yasin – Yasin

arabic text: فَسُبْحَانَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
english translation text:
So immaculate is He in whose hand is the dominion of all things, and to whom you shall be brought back.
Yasin – Yasin
